response:
module 1: calculate the area of the golden rectangle  
the golden ratio φ = (1 + √5) / 2 ≈ 1.618  
the width of the rectangle is 2 meters  
the length of the rectangle is φ × 2 ≈ 3.236 meters  
the area of the rectangle is length × width ≈ 3.236 × 2 = 6.472 square meters  

module 2: calculate the exact length of the diagonal of the golden rectangle  
the diagonal of a rectangle is √(length² + width²)  
length = φ × 2, width = 2  
diagonal = √((φ² × 4) + 4)  
φ² = ((1 + √5) / 2)² = (1 + 2√5 + 5) / 4 = (6 + 2√5) / 4 = (3 + √5) / 2  
diagonal = √(4 × (3 + √5) / 2 + 4) = √(2 × (3 + √5) + 4) = √(6 + 2√5 + 4) = √(10 + 2√5)  

module 3: calculate the radius of the inscribed circle  
the radius of the inscribed circle is half the width of the rectangle  
radius = 2 / 2 = 1 meter  
the area of the circle is π × radius² = π × 1² = π square meters  

module 4: calculate the exact area of the region inside the rectangle but outside the circle  
the area of the rectangle is 6.472 square meters  
the area of the circle is π square meters  
the area of the region inside the rectangle but outside the circle is 6.472 - π square meters
